steps: "Contact Danske Bank Custody to request correction of withholding tax rate from 25% to 15% per DK-NO tax treaty for NOVO B dividend",
"Submit formal tax reclaim to Danish Tax Authority (Skat) for DKK 153,600 excess withholding using online claim form",
"Provide documentation: Norwegian tax residency certificate, dividend statement showing 25% withholding, and treaty rate confirmation",
"Follow up with custodian on implementation of Nordic Tax Withholding Agreement for future Danish dividend processing"

references.title: Skat.dk – Claiming Refund of Danish Dividend Tax
